top_articles.title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: Telecom Sleeper Cells, LLM Jailbreaks, Apple Forces U.K. Age Checks and More
top_articles.summary: Some weeks are loud. This one was quieter but not in a good way. Long-running operations are finally hitting courtrooms, old attack methods are showing up in new places, and research that stopped bein

top_articles.title: Critical Vulnerability in OpenAI Codex Allowed GitHub Token Compromise
top_articles.summary: Researchers found an OpenAI Codex vulnerability that could have been exploited to compromise GitHub tokens.

top_articles.title: CISA orders feds to patch actively exploited Citrix flaw by Thursday
top_articles.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) ordered government agencies to patch their Citrix NetScaler appliances against an actively exploited vulnerability by Thursday.

top_articles.title: Exploitation of Fresh Citrix NetScaler Vulnerability Begins
top_articles.summary: The critical-severity flaw leaks application memory and can be exploited to obtain authenticated administrative session IDs.

top_articles.title: F5 BIG-IP DoS Flaw Upgraded to Critical RCE, Now Exploited in the Wild
top_articles.summary: Initially disclosed as a high-severity denial-of-service (DoS), the bug was reclassified as a critical RCE issue.

top_articles.title: Critical Fortinet Forticlient EMS flaw now exploited in attacks
top_articles.summary: Attackers are now actively exploiting a critical vulnerability in Fortinet's FortiClient EMS platform, according to threat intelligence company Defused.
